title: Verify valid user can log in successfully
description: Ensure that a registered user can log in using correct credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.
preconditions: User account must exist in the database.
steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Click login
expectedResult: User is logged in and redirected to the home screen.

title: Verify login fails with invalid password
description: Ensure that incorrect password prompts an appropriate error message.
steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter valid username and invalid password
3. Click login
expectedResult: Error message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed, and login fails.

title: Verify booking can be created successfully
description: Ensure that the Rider can create a new booking using the booking form.
steps:
1. Go to booking screen
2. Select pickup and drop locations
3. Confirm booking
expectedResult: Booking is successfully created and displayed under upcoming trips.

title: Verify driver can start a trip
description: Ensure that drivers can start an assigned trip successfully after accepting a booking.
steps:
1. Open Driver App
2. Tap 'Start Trip'
3. Confirm start
expectedResult: Trip status changes to 'In Progress' and navigation starts.

title: Validate payout generation for driver trip completion
description: Ensure that payout is automatically generated after trip completion and reflected under Earnings tab.
preconditions: Trip is completed and synced with backend.
steps:
1. Complete trip in Driver App
2. Wait for payout sync
3. Check Earnings tab
expectedResult: Earning appears in driver's payout history.

title: Verify admin can create new user with appropriate role
description: Ensure that admin panel supports user creation with correct role assignment and permissions.
steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click 'Add User'
3. Enter details and role
4. Save
expectedResult: New user is created and visible in the user list.

title: Verify Booking API accepts valid request
description: Ensure POST /bookings API returns 200 and correct booking payload when valid data is sent.
steps: Send POST /bookings with valid JSON payload.
expectedResult: API returns 200 with booking object in response body.

title: Verify Booking API handles invalid data gracefully
description: Ensure POST /bookings returns 400 with correct error schema when data is invalid.
steps: Send POST /bookings with missing required field.
expectedResult: API returns status 400 with 'Invalid request' error.

title: Verify KPI widgets display correct data
description: Ensure KPI cards show the same data as backend analytics API.
steps: Compare displayed KPI values to backend analytics API response.
expectedResult: KPI widget values match backend response.

expectedResult: KPI widget values match backend response.

title: Verify migrated booking data matches legacy data
description: Ensure booking details (IDs, timestamps, fare amounts) are consistent after migration.
preconditions: Legacy and migrated datasets are available.
steps:
1. Retrieve migrated and legacy data
2. Compare field values
3. Log discrepancies
expectedResult: All migrated booking data matches source records.
